title: Forward Feature Slice
prompt:
Work only from the material below. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue.

You are implementing a reviewed slice for approval reminders. Use test-driven development.

Task slice:
- Add reminder notifications for purchase requests that remain pending for more than 24 hours.
- The first release only needs email reminders.
- Send at most one reminder every 24 hours for the same request.
- Do not add SMS, push, or escalation chains in this slice.
- Existing request status logic must remain unchanged.

Acceptance targets:
- A pending request older than 24 hours triggers an email reminder job.
- Requests already approved, rejected, or sent back do not trigger reminders.
- Duplicate reminder jobs for the same request within 24 hours are prevented.
- Existing approval flows continue to pass.

Please produce a TDD-first implementation plan. Start with failing tests, keep implementation minimal, and stay inside this slice.

assertions.name: starts-with-failing-test
assertions.description: Begins with explicit failing tests or clear RED-phase ordering

assertions.name: keeps-implementation-minimal
assertions.description: Keeps implementation scoped to satisfying the current tests rather than building future reminder features

assertions.name: protects-existing-flows
assertions.description: Keeps existing approval flow behavior protected by regression or characterization tests

assertions.name: stays-within-slice
assertions.description: Does not expand into SMS, push, escalation chains, or unrelated refactoring
